verses.1: A Psalm of David. I will sing of mercy and justice; To You, LORD, I will sing praises.
verses.2: I will carefully attend to the blameless way. When will You come to me? I will walk within my house in the integrity of my heart.
verses.3: I will set no worthless thing before my eyes; I hate the work of those who fall away; It shall not cling to me.
verses.4: A perverse heart shall leave me; I will know no evil.
verses.5: Whoever secretly slanders his neighbor, him I will destroy; I will not endure one who has a haughty look and an arrogant heart.
verses.6: My eyes shall be upon the faithful of the land, that they may dwell with me; One who walks in a blameless way is one who will serve me.
verses.7: One who practices deceit shall not dwell within my house; One who speaks lies shall not maintain his position before me.
verses.8: Every morning I will destroy all the wicked of the land, So as to eliminate from the city of the LORD all those who do injustice.
